data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of your ClearPass server.
data_description.client_id: The OAuth2 client ID configured in ClearPass.
data_description.api_key: The client secret for the OAuth2 client.

yaml_import_cannot_connect.title: YAML import failed: cannot connect
yaml_import_cannot_connect.description:
The YAML configuration for Aruba ClearPass at `{host}` could not be imported because the connection failed.

Please check that `{host}` is reachable, update your `configuration.yaml` if needed, and restart Home Assistant.
